choices.text: Constraints declared on #[derive(Accounts)] struct: init, mut, signer, seeds + bump, has_one, constraint = expr. Anchor enforces before instruction body runs. Declarative access control + auto IDL generation.
Use checked_add/sub/mul/div + ? operator. Unchecked arithmetic with attacker-supplied amounts can wrap → drain. Always wrap u64 math with checked variants returning Option.
Derived from seeds + program ID, off Ed25519 curve, no private key. Only deriving program signs. Used for per-user state, vaults, global config. Cache bump on account; reuse to save CU.

CPI via anchor_spl::token::transfer with CpiContext::new(token_program, Transfer { from, to, authority }). For PDA-owned vaults, use new_with_signer with seeds + bump. Reentrancy auto-detected at depth 4.

questions.explanation: CPI to token program via CpiContext.

choices.text: CpiContext::new_with_signer(program, accounts, &[&[seed1, seed2, &[bump]]]). Runtime verifies derivation; PDA signs without private key. Only the program that derived can use this.
